name: Six Flags America
owner:
ABC Attractions (1974–1978)

Jim Fowler (1978–1980)

Wild World (1980–1992)

Premier Parks (1992–1998)

Six Flags (1998–2025)
description: Six Flags America is a decommissioned 131 acre amusement park in Woodmore, Maryland, United States.  Owned by Six Flags, it is located near Upper Marlboro, Maryland, and in the Washington, DC, metropolitan area.  It had a water park named Hurricane Harbor Maryland.
imageAttribution: An aerial view of the park in 2016
